description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a flat, slightly raised roof rimmed with thick wooden beams. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. One side features two rectangular openings: a door on the left and a window on the right, both framed with the same wood as the rest of the structure. The other sides are solid, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design. The roof appears to be flat and slightly recessed, possibly for water drainage or to serve as a shallow platform. The overall look suggests a sturdy, functional shelter suitable for parks, backyards, or urban green spaces.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a flat, thick-rimmed roof and horizontal plank siding. One side features a door and a window, while the other sides are solid wood.
description_view_0: This view shows a solid wooden side with horizontal planks and no openings.
description_view_1: This is the longest side of the cabin, fully solid with horizontal wood planks and no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Another solid side, identical to view 0, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: This view displays the front of the cabin, featuring a rectangular door on the left and a window on the right, both framed in wood.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with thick wooden rim and slight recess
attribute_window_arrangement: Two rectangular windows on the front facade, asymmetrically placed with one on the right side; no windows on other visible sides.
attribute_door_placement: Single rectangular door on the front facade, offset to the left next to the window.
